title: Kv1tka's ModPack
description: My personal modpack which I tried to optimize both in terms of gameplay and FPS
body: ModPack is specialized in adventures - backpacks, sleeping bags, handicrafts, semi-realistic medicine. Better fight, sleep, food mechanics, it's all here. When creating the modpack, I tried to maintain a balance between realistic hardcore and not boring adventures with a lot of different mechanics.
